agh_admin_user.label: Admin 用户名
agh_admin_user.help: Web UI 登录用户名。3-32 位字母数字下划线。

agh_admin_password.label: Admin 密码
agh_admin_password.help: Web UI 登录密码。留空 = 自动生成 24 位强密码（运行结束日志显示一次）。AdGuard 会用 bcrypt 存储。
agh_admin_password.helpEn: Web UI password. Empty = auto-generate 24-char strong password (shown once in run log). Stored as bcrypt.

agh_web_port.label: Web UI 端口
agh_web_port.help: Web 管理面板端口。默认 8080。改成 80 可省去端口号但会与 nginx / caddy 冲突。
agh_web_port.helpEn: Web admin panel port. Default 8080. Set to 80 to skip port suffix but conflicts with nginx/caddy.

agh_dns_port.label: DNS 端口
agh_dns_port.help: DNS 服务端口。**必须是 53**——否则客户端要带端口号（多数路由器不支持）。**冲突预警**：systemd-resolved 默认占 127.0.0.53:53，需先关闭：sudo systemctl disable --now systemd-resolved
agh_dns_port.helpEn: DNS service port. **Must be 53**—otherwise clients need port suffix (most routers don't support). **Conflict warning**: systemd-resolved occupies 127.0.0.53:53 by default, disable first.

agh_data_dir.label: 数据目录
agh_data_dir.help: 存配置 + 查询日志 + 统计数据 + 屏蔽列表缓存。备份此目录 = 备份完整 AdGuard 配置。
agh_data_dir.helpEn: Stores config + query log + stats + filter cache. Back up this dir = full AdGuard config backup.
